ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE ORDER FOR DETAILS.
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,900.00 FILED BY TIHONOVA, YELENA AS TO DEFENDANT AGENCY 360 SF, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-16-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF TIHONOVA, YELENA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-16-2020 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-04-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. HEARING DATE SET AT THE INSISTENCE OF PLAINTFF. I ATTEMPTED TO EXPLAIN TO PLAINTIFF THAT MORE TIME WAS NEEDED TO ALLOW FOR PROPER SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WISHED TO MOVE FORWARD WITH THE FEBRUARY 4, 2020 DATE. PLAINTIFF ALSO REPRESENTED THAT WHEN THE DEFENDANT AGENCY 360 SF, INC WAS SERVED, A PAYMENT FOR THE AMOUNT REQUESTED WAS ELECTRONICALLY PAID TO PLAINTIFF BUT THEN THE CHARGES WERE DISPUTED SEVERAL DAYS LATER AND THE FUNDS WERE REVERSED. DEFENDANT AGENCY 360 SF, INC. WAS AWARE OF TODAY'S HEARING. NOTICE OF THE CONTINUANCE OF THE HEARING HAS BEEN SENT TO ALL PARTIES. PLAINTIFF YELENA TIHONOVA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AGENCY 360 SF, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
TRIAL RESET TO APR-07-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-03-2020 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF TIHONOVA, YELENA
REMARK: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER SENT TO DEFENDANT,UNABLE TO FORWARD.
